label: ILC1
evidence: Reynolds 2021 main text: 'We identified 4 clusters of innate lymphocytes that were CD161(KLRB1)+ CD3(CD3D/CD3G)-, consisting of ILC1/3, ILC2, ILC1/Natural Killer (NK) and NK cells. Plasticity within ILC1 and ILC3 is also recognized, as reflected in our annotation of ILC1/3.' ILC1 in Gopee 2024 corresponds to the ILC1/3 population in Reynolds 2021, annotated to capture the known ILC1-ILC3 plasticity in adult skin.
